arts.ttl: Jonathan Tah reveals why Rüdiger is so unpleasant to play against
arts.sum: When I look at Rüdiger and his mind games, I celebrate them, they are unpleasant for all opponents. I know how repugnant it is for a striker to constantly have the feeling that someone is breathing on your neck or saying something in your ear.

arts.ttl: RN Report: Illness leaves four BVB defenders unable to face Leverkusen
arts.sum: Westphalia's Ruhr Nachrichten newspaper reports that illness will keep no fewer than four Borussia Dortmund players out of action this evening at the BayArena.

arts.ttl: ‘Ready for the next step’ – Who is ‘warrior’ Bayer Leverkusen star Piero Hincapie?
arts.sum: Piero Hincapie has only just turned 23 years old but he is already an established Bundesliga player with bags of experience at the highest level. The Bayer Leverkusen defender was part of the club’s unprecedented unbeaten league-winning campaign last term.
